title: Leidos' DES Contract Win, Largest in Company History, is Upheld by the GAO
text: RESTON, Va. , June 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, announced today that the Defense Enclave Services (DES) contract awarded by the Defense Information Systems Agency (DISA) was upheld by the Government Accountability Office (GAO) after a thorough and disciplined review.

title: Punta Cana International Airport Selects Leidos as Airport Checkpoint Technology Provider
text: RESTON, Va. , June 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE:LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, was selected by the Dominican Republic's Punta Cana International Airport (PUJ) to upgrade their security checkpoints.

title: Leidos Announces 2022 Supplier Innovation & Technology Award Winners
text: RESTON, Va. , June 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE:LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, today announced the recipients of the 2022 Supplier Innovation & Technology awards.
